name: First Principles
blessing: Reduce complexity to core truths, then rebuild with intention.

name: Second-Order Thinking
blessing: Trace consequences beyond the first win to protect future outcomes.

name: Inversion
blessing: Ask what would guarantee failure, then remove those paths.

name: OODA Loop
blessing: Observe, orient, decide, and act faster than confusion can spread.

name: 80/20 Rule
blessing: Identify the vital few actions that produce the most impact.

name: Systems Thinking
blessing: Map relationships and feedback loops before forcing quick fixes.

name: Constraint Mapping
blessing: Treat limits as design parameters that reveal sharper solutions.

name: Opportunity Cost
blessing: Choose with awareness of what every yes makes impossible.

name: Decision Journal
blessing: Record assumptions now so future you can learn from reality.

name: Circle of Competence
blessing: Play strongest where your understanding is deep and tested.

name: Pareto Frontier
blessing: Seek options where no gain requires a hidden equal loss.

name: Leverage
blessing: Apply effort where one move can multiply many outcomes.

name: Reversible vs Irreversible
blessing: Move quickly on reversible choices and slowly on one-way doors.

name: Expected Value
blessing: Evaluate choices by probable return, not emotional intensity.

name: Regret Minimization
blessing: Pick the path your future self will respect most.

name: North Star Metric
blessing: Align action around one metric that reflects true user value.

name: Jobs to Be Done
blessing: Design for the progress people actually hire your solution to make.

name: MECE
blessing: Break problems into buckets that are complete and non-overlapping.

name: 5 Whys
blessing: Follow each symptom to the root cause before intervening.

name: Cost of Delay
blessing: Price waiting honestly, then prioritize with urgency and clarity.

name: Risk Matrix
blessing: Treat high-impact and high-likelihood threats before they materialize.

name: Pre-Mortem
blessing: Imagine failure in advance to prevent it in the present.

name: Post-Mortem
blessing: Turn setbacks into reusable wisdom through candid reflection.

name: Single Source of Truth
blessing: Keep critical facts in one trusted place to prevent drift.

name: Default to Action
blessing: Prefer tested momentum over endless theoretical optimization.

name: Slow is Smooth
blessing: Reduce errors first, and speed will emerge from precision.

name: Feedback Loops
blessing: Build rapid signals so reality can guide each next move.

name: Bottleneck Theory
blessing: Improve the narrowest point and the whole system accelerates.

name: Energy Management
blessing: Schedule deep work when attention is strongest, not when convenient.

name: Two-Way Doors
blessing: Experiment boldly when choices are easy to reverse.

name: Working Backwards
blessing: Start from the ideal outcome and derive the path in reverse.

name: Minimum Viable Test
blessing: Learn cheaply with the smallest experiment that answers the key risk.

name: Anti-Goals
blessing: Define what must never happen to preserve your strategic boundaries.

name: Principled Trade-offs
blessing: Choose what to optimize only after naming what you will sacrifice.

name: Throughput over Busyness
blessing: Measure finished value, not motion dressed as progress.

name: Map and Territory
blessing: Remember models are useful guides, not reality itself.

name: Signal vs Noise
blessing: Protect attention by filtering distraction from meaningful evidence.

name: Deliberate Practice
blessing: Train weak points with focused repetition and fast correction.

name: Compounding
blessing: Honor small daily gains that become dramatic over long horizons.

name: Lindy Effect
blessing: Give extra trust to ideas that have already survived time.

name: Red Teaming
blessing: Invite intelligent opposition to expose blind spots early.

name: Steelman
blessing: Strengthen opposing views first to refine your own reasoning.

name: Decision Hygiene
blessing: Separate process quality from short-term outcome luck.
